task: Phase 1 - Batch Actions, Quick Actions, Enhanced Status Bar

details: Ctrl+A to select all visible services
Selection count badge in header bar
Confirmation dialogs for stop and remove operations
Batch mode toggle in action panel (shows batch-specific buttons)
Prune Docker button (opens existing prune dialog)
Loading state with progress bar for all quick actions
Docker daemon status indicator (green/red dot with version)
Async refresh of Docker system info on each scan
